summary: MedTech If the stabilized character reaches properly equipped

mechanics.name_guess: MedTech If the stabilized character reaches properly equipped
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 125 > npcs > MedTech If the stabilized character reaches properly equipped
mechanics.excerpt: MedTech If the stabilized character reaches properly equipped facil: Ity in time the next step in preventing death is the application of various monitors, IV tubes and other life support equipment; as well as the administration of various drugs. This treatment takes minutes and uses the MedTech Skill The difficulty modifier for the MedTech Skill Check is equal to the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the target minus the character's BOD WIL (in other words_ tne same modifier the First Aid Check had).
